## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated when behavior, commands, MCP schemas, or environment variables changed
- [ ] No credentials, private Figma IDs, proprietary artifacts, generated output, or unrelated changes included

## Security Impact

Describe changes to Figma token scopes, MCP read/write behavior, filesystem output, browser capture, or external services. Write `None` if not applicable.
